message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
package "javax" {
    package swing <<Folder>> {
        [JFrame] as JFrame
    }
}

class AdministratorView {
+ addEntryButton : JButton
- dataTable : JTable
- dataPane : JScrollPane
- deleteParcelButton : JButton
- rootPanel : JPanel
- tablePanel : JPanel
- updateEntryButton : JButton
- viewCoordinatorsButton : JButton
- viewPostmansButton : JButton
--
AdministratorView()
getDataTable()
getUpdateEntryButtonText()
getViewCoordinatorsButton()
setDataTable(table)
setDataText(text)
getTableDataModel(model)
updateUI(uiManager)
viewCoordinator(coordinatorId)
viewParcels(parcelList)
}

class CoordinatorView {
addContainerToMapPane(containerName, containerType)
deleteSelectedRow(rowNumber)
displayError(errorMsg)
editReport(reportContent)
generateNewReports(newDateRangeStart,newEndDateEnd,options...) -> List<GeneratedFile> // returns list of generated files or null if failed due to invalid input parameters etc.. 
getCurrentUserDetails(userRoleEnumValue): UserDetailsObject; /* Returns current user details based on role enum value passed */
